## Summary / Resumen

Describe the change and the user-facing impact.

## Checklist / Lista

- [ ] I tested the change locally.
- [ ] I updated docs or UI text when needed.
- [ ] I kept English and Spanish content aligned.
- [ ] I followed the recommended commit style (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`).

## Screenshots or notes / Capturas o notas

Add screenshots, recordings, or extra notes when they help reviewers.
